title: Light emitting device and LED display apparatus including the same
abstract: A display apparatus includes a display substrate, and light emitting devices arranged on an upper surface of the display substrate. At least one of the light emitting devices includes a first LED unit including a first light emitting stack, a second LED unit including a second light emitting stack, and a third LED unit including a third light emitting stack. Each of the first to third light emitting stacks includes a first conductivity type semiconductor layer and a second conductivity type semiconductor layer. the first conductivity type semiconductor layer and the second conductivity type semiconductor layer in each of the first to third light emitting stacks are stacked in a horizontal direction with respect to the upper surface of the display substrate. At least one of the second conductivity type semiconductor layers in the first to third light emitting stacks is divided into two regions.
claims: 1. A light emitting apparatus comprising: a substrate; light emitters arranged in a matrix on the substrate; a first black material disposed on the substrate; a driver; and a connector electrically connected to the driver, wherein: the light emitters include a first emitter, a second emitter, and a third emitter; the second emitter is disposed between the first emitter and the third emitter; each of the first, second, and third emitters includes a first type semiconductor layer and a second type semiconductor layer, and an active layer disposed between the first type semiconductor layer and the second type semiconductor layer; the first black material is disposed between the first emitter and the second emitter and is spaced apart from the second emitter with no emitters being disposed between the first black material and the second emitter; the substrate includes a first side on which the light emitters are disposed, a second side opposite to the first side, and a hole; and the driver is disposed on the second side of the substrate.
